name: Railway
analogy: Like renting a computer in the cloud that runs your database 24/7
whatItDoes: Railway is a cloud platform that lets you deploy databases, APIs, and other backend services without managing servers yourself. You can spin up a PostgreSQL database in minutes and Railway handles backups, uptime, and scaling. It connects easily to other services in your stack and provides a simple dashboard to monitor your deployments.
whyYouUseIt: The PostgreSQL database for SafetyIQ runs on Railway. Vercel hosts the Next.js app, but Vercel cannot host a persistent database — so Railway fills that gap by keeping the database running around the clock. The DATABASE_URL environment variable in SafetyIQ points directly to the Railway-hosted PostgreSQL instance.
whenToSwap: Supabase is a great alternative that bundles a PostgreSQL database with built-in auth, storage, and a real-time API — all in one product. Render offers a similar deployment model with slightly different pricing. Fly.io gives you more control and is better for teams that want to deploy Docker containers globally.
